commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]

target.title: fix: remove duplicate restart message on Windows (schtasks)
target.body:
## Summary

Replaced the stale mixed diff with a narrow gateway fix for Windows Scheduled Task start/restart output.

- Remove service-layer restart success writes from `src/daemon/schtasks.ts`.
- Emit the non-JSON Windows Scheduled Task success line once from `runServiceStart` / `runServiceRestart` after CLI health/retry handling settles.
- Keep JSON output unchanged.
- Drop the unrelated browser CDP/profile-service changes from the old branch.

## Behavior addressed

`openclaw gateway restart` on native Windows could print `Restarted Scheduled Task` twice when stale gateway process cleanup triggered a second `service.restart()` call. The CLI now owns the final human-facing success line, so the retry path can restart twice internally while printing one completed restart message.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: native Windows Scheduled Task non-JSON start/restart messaging.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux changed gate for the current branch. Native Azure Windows and Azure Windows WSL2 Crabbox were attempted but blocked waiting for coordinator leases.

Exact steps or command run after this patch:

```sh
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.test.ts src/daemon/schtasks.stop.test.ts src/daemon/schtasks.startup-fallback.test.ts
node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.test.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/test-helpers/lifecycle-core-harness.ts src/daemon/schtasks.ts
./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/lifecycle-core.test.ts src/cli/daemon-cli/test-helpers/lifecycle-core-harness.ts src/daemon/schtasks.ts
git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --idle-timeout 45m --ttl 90m --timing-json --stop-after always --label windows-restart-output-63651-check --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"
```

Evidence after fix: focused Vitest passed 56 tests; oxlint passed; oxfmt check passed; diff whitespace check passed; AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed on run `run_6bb1ce9a382a`, lease `cbx_d0751480f0d2`, slug `crimson-barnacle`.

Observed result after fix: unit coverage proves a stale-process retry calls `service.restart()` twice but logs `Gateway service restarted.` exactly once, and proves `openclaw gateway start` still prints `Gateway service started.` when it reuses the Scheduled Task restart primitive.

What was not tested: live native Windows and WSL2 CLI execution. Azure native Windows run `run_992d68e6932c` (`swift-lobster`) and Azure WSL2 run `run_4f9110ef5ab9` (`jade-hermit`) both waited 3 minutes without receiving a coordinator lease and were cancelled.
target.author: chudwx
